title: Alton Lochner
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Alton_Lochner.png]] |name=Alton Lochner |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]-[[Morellian]] [[Hybrid/Legends|hybrid]]''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=Black |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Dark |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] **[[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] **[[Task Force on Alliance Security]] **[[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] ***[[Eclipse Team]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The first attack on Alton came as a complete surprise.|[[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Adazian Liebke]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]|}} '''Alton Lochner''', born '''Tiris Warren''', was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] officer serving with [[Eclipse Team]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|This will no doubt draw Lochner and his companions. It will be a personal challenge to combat.''"
"''This is a business transaction. Its only purpose is financial gain. If Lochner and his friends are drawn into this, it is a happy coincidence.|[[Arcuse]] and [[Callandri]] from the [[Granse Confederacy]]|}} Tiris Warren was the son of [[Morellian]] scout [[Barosa Warren]] and an unknown mother. Tiris Warren and his father, however, were on bad terms, especially since Tiris joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], opposing Barosa's wishes. Angry at Barosa, Tiris even changed his legal name. Tiris Warren's siblings were [[Danlea Lochner]] (she changed her surname for the same reason), [[Roland Warren]] and [[Tole Warren]]. All of them were half-Morellian and probably came from different mothers. Tiris Warren, now Alton Lochner, became a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] in Rebel [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]], a respected member of the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] and a part of infamous Eclipse Team. He served as Cloak Leader and used the ship ''[[Abubaka II]]''. He was respected by military and intelligence operatives because of different successful operations and rescues of other Rebels. Perhaps it was due to Lochner's presence in Alliance Intelligence that Barosa Warren became a threat to Alliance Intelligence. However, Lochner's relation to Warren was unknown to most people. Alton Lochner had another enemy in professional assassin [[Callandri]]. Callandri had wanted to kill Lochner for a long time, for unknown reasons. She performed her first attempt on the life of Rebel lieutenant Lochner when she found him in the [[Brawl and Grill]] establishment, in [[Trader's Quarter]], [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. She entered the bar shooting. Although Lochner's life was saved by his drinking pals, including the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Tirranna]] and [[Adazian Liebke]], he spent weeks in the infirmary. A report on this fight was written by [[Vanden Willard/Legends|Vanden Willard]]. Wanting to get even with Lochner and Tirranna, Callandri and her cousin and associate [[Zayl Braith]] attacked them again on [[Triewahl Docking Station]], but they were again saved by their partners. Callandri then formed the [[Granse Confederacy]] with a few partners (particularly [[Kiran Tatch]], who felt a personal antagonism towards Lochner for unknown reasons). Many within the Alliance's command structure believed that Callandri formed the Confederacy specifically to assassinate Lochner, but this was never proven. However, it is known that the other members of the Granse Confederacy knew of Callandri's motivation against Lochner. An associate of Rebel commander [[Derembus Sitnalta]] and of [[Sasnak Toxis]], Lochner visited [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] and then noticed slavers [[Chordak]] and [[Talas Piran]] dealing with their stock. Sasnak noticed that one of the slaves was a person he knew, and he had disliked Chordak for a time. The event became a fight until the prefect arrived; the Rebels ran away and the slaves were freed. Due to this, Piran kept a grudge towards those three Rebels, or so Sitnalta thought. [[3 ABY/Legends|One year later]], Lochner joined several other Alliance [[Officer/Legends|officers]], including Lieutenant Commander [[Anson Blazer]], on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] to enjoy a leave. They were identified by [[Niclara Varnillian]], [[Chief gunnery officer/Legends|chief gunnery officer]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Pulsar (Star Destroyer)|''Pulsar'']]. Varnillian was provided with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], and a [[Skirmish on Ord Mantell (3 ABY)|firefight]] ensued. Over thirty-six innocent civilians and several Imperials were killed in the crossfire, and, while Varnillian took two Rebel prisoners to the ''Pulsar'', the others escaped.{{JournalCite|8|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}} ==Sources== *{{JournalCite|4|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}} {{1stm}} *''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' *{{JournalCite|8|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Lochner, Alton}} [[Category:Alliance Intelligence members]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Near-Human Hybrids]] [[Category:Task Force on Alliance Security personnel]]
